title: can I ever be free from pain, if I am not free from Fear?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: if #66 can I ever be free of pain if I'm not free from fear?
body:
if #66 can I ever be free of pain if I'm not free from fear?

if I'm not free from Fear, can I never be free to love?
content:
if #66 can I ever be free of pain if I'm not free from fear?

if I'm not free from Fear, can I never be free to love?
